name: storefront-next
description: Storefront Next development skills for building React 19 storefronts on Salesforce B2C Commerce.

interface.shortDescription: Build Salesforce B2C Storefront Next projects with AI assistance.
interface.longDescription: Skills for developing React 19 storefronts on Salesforce B2C Commerce — routing, data fetching, components, Page Designer, authentication, i18n, extensions, testing, and deployment to Managed Runtime.
defaultPrompt: Set up a new Storefront Next project
Add a new route with data fetching to my storefront
Deploy my storefront to Managed Runtime
Add Page Designer support to my storefront component
